title: Manage user environments and apps for Azure Virtual Desktop

sections.title: Manage user environments and apps for Azure Virtual Desktop
sections.summary: Manage user environments and apps for Azure Virtual Desktop

lessons.title: Implement and manage FSLogix
lessons.content_md:
FSLogix provides customers with both ease of configuration and various levels of flexibility.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-manage-fslogix/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure user experience settings
lessons.content_md:
Virtual desktop provides users easy and seamless access to their assigned VMs, often with a single sign-on solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-user-experience-settings/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Install and configure apps on a session host
lessons.content_md:
MSIX app attach is a way to deliver MSIX applications to both physical and virtual machines. MSIX app attach is different from regular MSIX because it’s specifically for Azure Virtual Desktop.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/install-configure-apps-session-host/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Install and configure apps on a session host

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Manage user environments and apps for Azure Virtual Desktop
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Manage user environments and apps for Azure Virtual Desktop**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
